data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific entry triggers: booking completed, no-show, membership expiring, and form submitted. While there is evidence of a booking being completed, there is no evidence provided for the other triggers (no-show, membership expiring, form submitted). This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as not all entry triggers are validated.
evidencePointers: no evidence for no-show, membership expiring, or form submitted triggers
gaps: No evidence for membership expiring trigger.
No evidence for form submitted trigger.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
